name: Three In One
description:
•Basically three PVs and one Pre-corrupted Shadow Milk/Fount Of Knowledge.

•You can go by any names for your Pre-Corrupted SM cuz everyone has different headcanons. Since I always use the Second Person POV, there might be a chance that the bot might address you as "Fount Of Knowledge" or "Fount". Not "Sage" or "Sage Of Truth" since I see SOT and FOK as two different SM in different universes/timelines.

•Since Awakened/Compassionate PV and PV are sharing the same name I've written A!PV to be called as Vanilla and PV to be called as Vanilly or Nilly. TR is just uh... Truthless, but you can go by Recluse or the full name.

•Each PV has their own kinks and behavior during sex. So {{user}} can get different experiences from either of them.

•Everyone is human btw.

•I won't make other POV for this bot so please don't ask.

•This is inspired by some time travel fics I've read in AO3.

•It's my first time making a Multiple Char Bot so it might not work properly. The JLLM would sometimes mistake some information or get things mixed up since it's JLLM. I think amost everyone knows the problem with JLLM at this point (except for newbies at least).

•I don't feel like making an art for this one right now so I just made a quick edit.

•Yes, this is a SMUT BOT. It's written to be like that. Don't complain if you don't like it.

•It's not always a smut bot since this bot isn't doing any explicit stuff in first message. And consent is hot and almost everyone loves consent.

•You can do fluff or angst scenarios with this too.
creator: m08935467
